description.ko: 첨단 기술과 도시의 쇠락이 공존하는 미래형 거대 도시의 압도적인 전경으로, 영원히 꺼지지 않는 네온 사인과 흩뿌리는 비가 어우러져 몽환적인 분위기를 자아냅니다.
description.en: A breathtaking view of a futuristic megacity where advanced technology meets urban decay, bathed in the glow of eternal neon lights and atmospheric rain.

prompt: Cinematic shot of a sprawling cyberpunk city at night, heavy rain reflecting vibrant neon signs in magenta and electric blue, crowded multi-level streets with holographic advertisements, flying vehicles weaving between massive skyscrapers, hyper-detailed futuristic architecture, 8k, volumetric lighting, synthwave aesthetic.
